data.title: $1.4B poured into crypto funds last week; assets under management jump to $154.8B as Bitcoin climbs to near $78,000.
data.description: Last week, cryptocurrency investment products saw an inflow of $1.4 billion as Bitcoin surged to nearly $78,000. This resulted in assets under management reaching $154.8 billion.
NITROGEN FERTILIZER PRICES HAVE NEARLY DOUBLED SINCE THE IRAN WAR AND MAY INCREASE MORE DUE TO KEY SUPPLIES BEING STUCK IN THE PERSIAN GULF, AS STATED BY A MAJOR EXPORTER.
TSUNAMI WARNING LOWERED TO ADVISORY FOLLOWING JAPAN EARTHQUAKE, REPORTS NHK.

data.title: Superior Announces Significant Data Center Growth at Certarus
data.description: Superior Plus Corp. announced that its subsidiary, Certarus Ltd., a top provider of mobile compressed natural gas solutions, is expanding in the hyperscale data center market. Certarus is seeing growth due to rising power needs for data centers and related infrastructure. They have secured substantial new customer agreements in this fast-growing market, highlighting the increasing demand.

data.title: Tellabs Partners with AEC UPS at Data Center World 2026 to Unveil Next-Gen IT/OT Networking Solutions for Faster Deployments.
data.description: Tellabs has recently teamed up with AEC UPS to provide essential infrastructure solutions, ensuring dependable and continuous data center functionality. The collaboration was unveiled at Data Center World 2026 in CARROLLTON, Texas, on April 20. This partnership aims to enhance support for data centers worldwide, combining Tellabs' expertise with AEC UPS' capabilities to deliver reliable operations. The event, a prominent global gathering for the sector, highlighted the significance of this venture in ensuring uninterrupted data center services.

data.title: enCore Energy Appoints Richard Little as Chief Executive Officer; William M. Sheriff Returns as Executive Chair
data.description: On April 20, 2026, enCore Energy Corp. (NASDAQ: EU) (TSXV: EU) based in Dallas, declared that the self-contained members of its Board of Directors have collectively agreed to nominate the Company as "America's Clean Energy Company™." This decision was made by enCore, a leading nuclear energy corporation.

data.title: New Found Gold Announces $205M Finance Package
data.description: A financing deal worth $100 million was recently secured, with key investments from EdgePoint and prominent investor Eric Sprott. Additionally, a Senior Secured Credit Facility worth $105 million was established with EdgePoint.

data.title: Clearmind Medicine Announced Positive Top-Line Safety Results: CMND-100 Proprietary Psychedelic Treatment Meets Primary Endpoint in AUD Trial
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Clearmind Medicine Inc. (Nasdaq: CMND), a biotech company based in Vancouver, Canada, revealed that their drug candidate CMND-100, an oral, non-hallucinogenic MEAI-based treatment for Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD), successfully achieved the primary goal in its FDA-approved Phase I/IIa clinical study. Clearmind focuses on developing innovative psychedelic-derived therapeutics targeting untreated health issues, utilizing second-generation neuroplastogen compounds. The company's mission is to address critical medical problems through advanced research and drug development.

data.title: Securitas AB to publish the Interim Report January-March 2026 on April 28, 2026
data.description: On April 28, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. (CEST), Securitas AB is set to release its Interim Report for January-March 2026. The report will be made public via a press release from Cision (www.cision.se).

data.title: Zadarma, the leading cloud telephony provider across Europe, the United States, and Latin America, is now available in Italian
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Zadarma, a global VoIP service provider, revealed that its platform is now fully accessible in Italian, catering to its 2.5 million users worldwide. This development marks a significant achievement for the company as it aims to strengthen its presence in Italy and enhance its services for a larger audience.

data.title: Jumex® to Spotlight New Jumex® GoMix™ Gummies and Odwalla® Juices at NAMA Show 2026
data.description: Discover groundbreaking fruit innovation and exciting flavor encounters at Booth #1550 in LOS ANGELES, with Jumex® showcasing its expertise in real fruit and a wide range of beverages and snacks at the NAMA Show 2026 from April 22 to 24. This event will be held at the Los Angeles Convention Center, offering attendees the chance to explore Jumex®'s growing selection of products firsthand.

data.title: LayerZero reveals Kelp setup led to $290M exploit, as Aave loss dispute grows, raises concerns on protocol covering.
data.description: LayerZero claimed that the DVN configuration of Kelp led to the exploit amounting to $290 million, prompting investors to raise concerns about which protocol would address the deficit.

data.title: Mastercard aims to settle card payments using stablecoins like SoFiUSD to expedite transaction clearing and connect finance with blockchain.
data.description: A new initiative is being tested by Mastercard, aimed at expediting card transaction clearance by utilizing stablecoin settlement with SoFiUSD. This move signifies a step towards the convergence of traditional finance practices with blockchain technology. The test is expected to provide insights into the potential benefits for the industry.

data.title: Nestimate and Nuveen Partner to Deliver Objective Target-Date Fund Evaluation Tool to Retirement Industry
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska, Nestimate, a retirement plan due diligence platform, has partnered with Nuveen, TIAA’s asset manager, to offer Nestimate's Target-date Fund Fit Analysis to retirement plan advisors across the country. This collaboration allows advisors to access the Nestimate platform for free through Nuveen, enabling them to assess retirement plan investment menus for plan sponsor clients in an unbiased manner. This partnership aims to provide valuable insights to advisors and facilitate better decision-making in retirement planning.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 20, 2026
data.description: Several companies are expected to report their quarterly earnings before the bell including SmartFinancial (SMBK), projected to report $0.79 per share on revenue of $53.55 million. Capital City Bank Group (CCBG) is likely to report $0.84 per share on revenue of $63.35 million, while Bank of Hawaii (BOH) is expected to report $1.34 per share on revenue of $193.57 million. Investar Holding (ISTR) is projected to report $0.68 per share on revenue of $36.48 million and Ennis (EBF) is likely to report $0.38 per share on revenue of $95.10 million. On the other hand, Cleveland-Cliffs (CLF) is estimated to report a quarterly loss of $0.41 per share on revenue of $4.81 billion, and Nano X Imaging (NNOX) is estimated to report a loss of $0.15 per share on revenue of $3.99 million. These reports can provide valuable insights into the financial health and performance of these companies.

data.title: QuidelOrtho Corporation Completes Acquisition of LEX Diagnostics
data.description: QuidelOrtho achieves a significant milestone in their growth strategy by introducing a new ultra-fast PCR platform for point-of-care molecular diagnostics. The platform is designed to provide results in under ten minutes, significantly reducing turnaround time. This launch expands QuidelOrtho's portfolio in this market, and the company anticipates starting the commercial rollout of the LEX VELO in the United States soon.
